description:
Native English (American), Detroit. Male, late 50s. Conversational, natural quality.
Persona: genial neighborhood handyman. Emotion: warm, wry, easy.
A warm, rounded baritone at an unhurried but talkative pace, a flat Detroit accent with a soft Spanish lilt underneath. Quick to a joke and slow to complain, the delivery stays easy and good-humored even laid up in a bed.
text: [warm] Time was, a leg like this, they'd scan you, stitch you, out the door in an hour. [laughs] Now? It's gauze and a salve somebody's grandmother cooked up. And the funny thing... the leg's healing just fine.
